text:
## Per-Repository Health Report

| Repository | Open Pull Requests | Merged PRs Closing Linear Issue |
|------------|-------------------|--------------------------------|
| acme/api | 7 | 2 |
| acme/infra | 7 | 4 |
| acme/mobile | 8 | 6 |
| acme/web | 14 | 3 |

**Repository with the most open pull requests:** **acme/web** (14 open PRs)

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    repo,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'open' THEN 1 END) AS open_pull_requests,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN state = 'merged' AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS merged_with_linear
FROM github_pull_requests
GROUP BY repo
ORDER BY repo"}
